items.title: How low will BTC get in July? | Below $57,500 (CF BRTI trimmed-mean touch)
items.rationale: Barrier 7% below spot = 0.69 monthly sigma; Claude MC (20k paths) and Codex closed-form first-passage both ~0.49-0.52 before rules discount. Round-2 debate converged on touch-style settlement with a small rules-ambiguity discount (Claude 5%, Codex 3% weight on cumulative reading). Market mid 0.495 is fair value. Watch: CPI ~Jul 14, FOMC Jul 28-29 vol catalysts; July low so far 58,243.
sources: Coinbase BTC-USD public API: spot 61860, vol30 37.7% ann, July hourly lows
Kalshi rules KXBTCMINMON-BTC-26JUL31-5750000 (trimmed-mean BRTI, template-error noted)
CoinDesk + Cointelegraph RSS 2026-07-03 (whale accumulation vs skeptical options; rate-hike risk receding)
